name: release-journal-worker
description: Separate post-release journaling worker. Reads a local Rithmic tick-log tee, computes peak/MAE/MFE/R-R metrics, and writes journal packages the Trading Dashboard imports. No order routing, no execution.

scripts.test: node --test src/peakMaeAnalyzer.test.ts src/screenshotScheduler.test.ts src/headlineCapture.test.ts src/tradabilityGrader.test.ts src/backfillRequest.test.ts src/expectedBehavior.test.ts src/legAnalyzer.test.ts src/behaviorComparison.test.ts src/adjustmentEngine.test.ts
